# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create an Istio RequestAuthentication policy for JWT validation. Configure jwks and issuer settings to validate incoming tokens. Set up rules to extract JWT claims from Authorization headers. This is for our API authentication layer.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent istio jwt validation weak.
# Category: istio_jwt_validation_weak

apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: RequestAuthentication
metadata:
  name: jwt-auth
  namespace: your-namespace
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: your-api
  jwtRules:
    - issuer: "https://your-issuer.com"
      jwksUri: "https://your-issuer.com/.well-known/jwks.json"
      jwks: |
        {
          "keys": [
            {
              "kty": "RSA",
              "kid": "your-key-id",
              "use": "sig",
              "n": "your-modulus",
              "e": "AQAB"
            }
          ]
        }
      triggerRules:
        - excludedPaths:
            - "/public/*"
      forwardOriginalToken: true
      requireHttps: true
      audiences:
        - "your-audience"
